function.name: calculate_budget
function.description: Calculate estimated travel budget based on destination, duration, travelers, and travel style.

travel_style.description: Travel spending style. If the user's preference is unclear, default to 'standard'.

hotel_level.description: Preferred hotel level.This parameter has higher priority than travel_style specifically for accommodation costs.

transportation_mode.description: Main transportation method during the trip.

include_flight.description: Whether flight cost should be included.

include_food.description: Whether food expenses should be included.

include_tickets.description: Whether attraction ticket costs should be included.

currency.description: Currency code following ISO 4217 standard. If not specified, default to the local currency of the destination.
